title: Ukrainian Andouille Skillet
description: A hearty and flavorful Ukrainian-inspired dish featuring andouille sausage in a skillet with toasted bread.
instructions: Heat the skillet oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced andouille sausage to the skillet and cook until browned.
Add the toasted Ukrainian bread to the skillet and break it up into small pieces.
Season the mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the Ukrainian Andouille Skillet hot.
